mapper.insert: insert /* @SQLID = SUB0202_0303-04_2#Sql001 */ into FOREIGN_CONSIGNMENT_ORDER( IFA_ORDER_NO, IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO, ACCEPT_ORDER_NO, ACCEPT_ORDER_SUB_NO, BUTEN_CODE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, BRAND_CODE, BRAND_NAME, EXCHANGE_CODE, METHOD_TYPE, TRADE_TYPE, ORDER_QUANTITY, TRADE_METHOD_TYPE, LIMIT_PRICE, STOP_PRICE, CURRENCY_CODE, SETTLEMENT_TYPE, DEPOSIT_TYPE, INVITATION_TYPE, ORDER_METHOD_TYPE, WARNING_APPLY_TYPE, EXPLANATION_INFO_TYPE, TRANSFER_INVITATION_TYPE, ENG_PUB_BRAND_EXP_TYPE, CONFIRMATION_TYPE, ORDER_TYPE, ORDER_DATE, ORDER_TIME, TRADE_DATE, TRADE_LIMIT_DATE, BROKER_CODE, INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD, API_ERROR_CODE, API_STATUS_CODE, API_MESSAGE, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_USER, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_USER ) values( #{req.ifaOrderNo}, #{req.ifaOrderSubNo}, #{req.acceptOrderNo}, #{req.acceptOrderSubNo}, #{req.butenCode}, #{req.accountNumber}, #{req.tickerCode}, #{req.brandName}, #{req.marketCode}, #{req.methodType}, #{req.tradeKbn}, #{req.orderQuantity}, #{req.priceConditionsType}, #{req.sashine}, #{req.stopOrderPrice}, #{req.currencyCode}, #{req.settlementType}, #{req.depositType}, #{req.kanyuKbn}, #{req.jutyuKbn}, #{req.warningApplyTrade}, #{req.importantMatterTypeClass}, #{req.solicitationEtfType}, #{req.engPubType}, #{req.beforeTradeConfirmType}, #{req.securityClassType}, #{req.orderDate}, #{req.orderTime}, #{req.domesticTradeDate}, #{req.orderDeadline}, #{req.brokerCode}, #{req.brokerChargeCode}, #{req.apiErrorCode}, #{req.apiStatusCode}, #{req.apiMsg}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.createUser}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.updateUser} )

insert /* @SQLID = SUB0202_0303-04_2#Sql002 */ into F_ORDER_POSITION_LINK( IFA_ORDER_NO, BRAND_CODE, METHODE_TYPE, LIMIT_TYPE, TRADE_TYPE, DEPOSIT_TYPE, QUOTATION_TRADE_DATE, QUOTATION_PRICE, QUOTATION_QUANTITY, REPAYMENT_QUANTITY, BUTEN_CODE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, REPAYMENT_METHOD_TYPE, REPAYMENT_ORDER_TYPE, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_USER, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_USER ) values( #{req.ifaOrderNo}, #{req.tickerCode}, #{req.methodType}, #{req.repayPeriodType}, #{req.tradeKbn}, #{req.depositType}, #{req.openTradeDate}, #{req.positionPrice}, #{req.positionQuantity}, #{req.repayQuantity}, #{req.butenCode}, #{req.accountNumber}, #{req.repaymentMethodType}, #{req.requestType}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.createUser}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.updateUser} )
mapper.select: select /* @SQLID = SUB0202_0303-04_2#Sql004 */ to_char(sysdate, 'YYYYMMDD') || lpad(SEQ_FOREIGN_CONSIGNMENT_ORDER.NEXTVAL, 5, '0') as IFA_ORDER_NO from dual
